title: Sasaella suwekoana
taxonomy: Sasaella suwekoana is classified as a species of bamboo, specifically in the genus Sasaella of the family Poaceae. It is part of the order Poales. At the kingdom and phylum levels, it is classified as Tracheophyta and Magnoliophyta respectively.
